source_meta: Abralatas/Recicla Latas (Brazil 2024), JACRA (Japan FY2023/FY2024), European Aluminium/Metal Packaging Europe (EU/Germany 2023), Aluminum Association/CMI (U.S. 2023), state CDS annual reports (Australia 2024), Endurvinnslan/Úrvinnslusjóður (Iceland). Estimates flagged 'est.'. PR current is a 2022 estimate per DRNA ISWMP / EPA State Measurement Program; PR target is the project proposal's Year-7 goal.

rates.name: Brazil
rates.note: 2024; 97.3% of cans sold recycled; ~33.9 B cans; cooperative-driven; scrap-export surge pulled 2023 100% down

rates.name: Germany
rates.note: 2023; 99% recovery; Novelis Nachterstedt + Speira Voerde can-sheet

rates.name: European Union (avg.)
rates.note: 2023 Europe aggregate 76.3%; 12+ states with DRS by 2025; 80/90% targets by 2029/2033

rates.name: United States
rates.note: 2023; 43% lowest in decades; deposit states 60–90%, non-deposit often <30%

rates.name: Australia
rates.note: 2024 est. 75–80% national; first continent fully covered (Tasmania May 2025); SA/NT/ACT 80%+

rates.name: Taiwan
rates.note: 2019 blended est.; 55% household / 77% industrial; strong domestic secondary loop

rates.name: Iceland
rates.note: ~88% aluminum can redemption (est. recent); ~844 kt/yr primary smelting but no domestic can-sheet, so UBC is exported for re-rolling

rates.name: Puerto Rico (current)
rates.note: est.; no DRS, no EPR for cans
